title: The Butter and Egg Man
writer: Adelaide Heilbron, Jack Jarmuth, George S. Kaufman
actors: Jack Mulhall, Greta Nissen, Sam Hardy
plot: Peter Jones is a young man who arrives on Broadway from Chillicothe, Ohio, hoping to invest $20,000 in a play and turn a profit sufficient to buy a local hotel back home. He is conned by Joe Lehman and Jack McClure into backing th...
